pi_items.source: verifier.py strictly checks if the number of CDB entries is >= 1 (line 37) and setup_task.sh enforces at least 1 IP entry is downloaded.
verifier.py strictly enforces a minimum rule level of 9 for full credit (line 52), directly matching the task description.
setup_task.sh downloads the threat intel feed from this exact URL using curl, which was verified as a live, publicly accessible real-world dataset.

pi_items.metadata_value: Integrate Feodo Tracker C2 IPs into Wazuh CDB list with detection rules
pi_items.verified_value: Integrate Feodo Tracker C2 IPs into Wazuh CDB list with detection rules
pi_items.source: Accurately represents the core objective implemented by the verifier and the overall intent of the task.json instructions.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on real, non-synthetic threat intelligence data dynamically downloaded from the Feodo Tracker C2 IP blocklist at abuse.ch. The verifier.py logic explicitly confirms that at least 1 valid IP entry must be integrated into a Wazuh CDB list, and the associated custom detection rule must have a severity level of at least 9 for full credit.
